flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Sandhills Community College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sandhills Community College fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.8k → $2.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sandhills Community College fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.9k → $6.6k).
